testsuite.name: Launch Keyless App in Real Device

testcase.name: Should launch the Keyless app in POCO
testcase.classname: Launch Keyless App in Real Device

failure.message: Failed [equal]: (Device setup failed — device may not be connected: Unable to connect to "http://localhost:4723/", make sure browser driver is running on that address. It seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections.) - expected "null" but got: "Error: Unable to connect to "http://localhost:4723/", make sure browser driver is running on that address. It seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections. at startWebDriverSession (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriver/build/node.js:1335:11) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5) at async _WebDriver.newSession (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriver/build/node.js:1753:41) at async remote (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriverio/build/node.js:9979:20) at async configAppiumTest (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\config\config.js:28:18) at async DescribeInstance.<anonymous> (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\nightwatch\tests\Launch Keyless.js:13:22)" (11ms)

testcase.failure: It seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections. at DescribeInstance.<anonymous> (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\nightwatch\tests\Launch Keyless.js:29:16)

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '$') at Object.verifyKeylessIcon (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\utlis\welcomeScreenUtlis.js:13:44) at DescribeInstance.<anonymous> (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\nightwatch\tests\Launch Keyless.js:31:34)
